name: @easysolutions906/mcp-healthcare
description: MCP server bundling healthcare data tools: ICD-10 codes, NPI provider lookup, NDC drug search, and DEA number validation

scripts.link-data: ln -sf ../../../icd10-api/src/data/icd10.json src/data/icd10.json && ln -sf ../../../icd10-api/src/data/meta.json src/data/icd10-meta.json && ln -sf ../../../ndc-api/src/data/ndc.json src/data/ndc.json && ln -sf ../../../ndc-api/src/data/meta.json src/data/ndc-meta.json
